data.body: 5e55 CLOSED+signed: external-integration green on main (run 29306638680, 25 passed) after 3 stacked fixes #672/#674/#677. Final sweep on main a91917b65: codeql/eval/external-integration/optionality/test.yml/verify-identity GREEN (push CI); terraform-drift/mirror-guard/reconcile-bridge-canary GREEN. ONE anomaly: a manual gerrit-verify workflow_dispatch (29306909107, by JoeOakhartNava, no-inputs, 04:49) failed on test_reviewbot_ensure_tickets.py:150 (expected rebar-review-bot@navateam.com, got joeoakhart+bot@navapbc.com — ambient git identity leaked into ensure-tickets). NOT a main-tree defect: test passes locally + in push-CI on same SHA a91917b65, and all other recent gerrit-verify runs pass. Re-running gerrit-verify on main to confirm one-off.
